TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dihekoay, title = Dihekoay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dihekoay} }

S.FORM: alang Dihekoay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 76 buwan, 198 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 167 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 31 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis80%, Puyuma1%, Setik1%, binah lihuyan s'uli3%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dihekoay hya' ga Cicala'ay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Dihekoay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Dihekoay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Dihekoay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 76 buwan, 198 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 167 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 31 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis80%, Puyuma1%, Setik1%, binah lihuyan s'uli3%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dihekoay hya' ga Cicala'ay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Dihekoay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Dihekoay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *iħekoaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ikekami ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ**%, pujuma*%, s~ɕetik*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli*%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *iħekoaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *iħekoaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *iħekoaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
